name: Blight
description: Necromantic energy washes over a creature of your choice that you can see within range, draining moisture and vitality from it. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. The target takes 8d8 Necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. This spell has no effect on Constructs or Undead. If you target a Plant creature or a magical plant, it makes the saving throw with Disadvantage and the spell deals maximum damage to it. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4.
